# IBAN negative corpus — these should NOT trigger the detector
# Invalid mod-97, product codes, identifiers that look like IBANs
GB82WEST12345698765433 (off-by-one, invalid mod-97)
DE00370400440532013000 (check digits 00, always invalid)
NOTANIBAN
Just the text GB with no digits
Country code US1234567890123 (not a real IBAN country code length)
PO Box 12345
Reference: REF-GB82-ABCD (not an IBAN)
Stock ticker: AAPL1234
Serial: AT611904-INVALID
AWS region: eu-west-1
Product code: NL91BULK0417
Article GB82 section 2 paragraph 3
Part number BE685390-0754-7034 (dashes in wrong place)
ZIP+4: 90210-1234
MAC address: DE:89:37:04:04:40
Model DE89-SIGMA-4405-320
SKU AT61-190430-023457
Customer ID NL91-ABNA-BULK
Route FR76-300-600-001
Reference CH93-0076-BULK
